message:
perf(codegen): Extract runtime helpers to prevent comptime explosion

Move inline @TypeOf/@hasField/inline-for blocks to runtime helpers,
reducing O(n²) monomorphization to O(n) for common operations.

Changes:
- Add slice_ops.zig: stepped slice helpers (fixes test_list timeout)
- Add set_ops.zig: SetOps(K) for remove/discard/pop/copy/set operations
- Add tuple_ops.zig: TupleOps(T) for dynamic tuple indexing
- Add copy_ops.zig: shallowCopy/deepCopy for copy module

Impact:
- Inline code reduced 60-75% per operation
- Type introspection compiled once per type, not once per call site
- Fixes compilation timeout on test_list.py (was >3min, now <30s)
